title: Question: Meeded to understand the reason for fatal warnings
body:
---


Author Name: **mehrdad khatir**
Original Redmine Message: 1906 from https://www.veripool.org



---

I have used verilator for simple codes such as counters and simple modules before. Now, I am trying to compile an AES code that I got from open core. It is synthesizable verilog code (http://opencores.org/project,tiny_aes). When I try to compile it using verilator or even perform the lint operation. I got the following warning messages, which I am not sure what does it mean:

```
mehrdad@ubuntu:~/verilog_examples/aes/original_rtl$ verilator  --lint-only {aes_128.v,round.v,table.v} 
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT: table.v:48: Signal unoptimizable: Feedback to clock or circular logic: v.r1.t0.__Vcellout__t0____pinNumber3
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT: Use "/* verilator lint_off UNOPTFLAT */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: table.v:48:  v.r1.t0.__Vcellout__t0____pinNumber3
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: table.v:50:  ASSIGNW
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: table.v:48:  v.r1.t0.__Vcellout__t0____pinNumber3
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT: round.v:24: Signal unoptimizable: Feedback to clock or circular logic: v.r1.p03
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: round.v:24:  v.r1.p03
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: table.v:50:  ASSIGNW
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: round.v:24:  v.r1.p03
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT: round.v:25: Signal unoptimizable: Feedback to clock or circular logic: v.r1.p13
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: round.v:25:  v.r1.p13
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: table.v:50:  ASSIGNW
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: round.v:25:  v.r1.p13
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT: round.v:26: Signal unoptimizable: Feedback to clock or circular logic: v.r1.p23
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: round.v:26:  v.r1.p23
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: table.v:50:  ASSIGNW
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: round.v:26:  v.r1.p23
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT: round.v:27: Signal unoptimizable: Feedback to clock or circular logic: v.r1.p33
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: round.v:27:  v.r1.p33
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: table.v:50:  ASSIGNW
%Warning-UNOPTFLAT:      Example path: round.v:27:  v.r1.p33
%Error: Exiting due to 5 warning(s)
%Error: Command Failed /usr/local/bin/verilator_bin --lint-only aes_128.v round.v table.v

```

I would be very grateful if you could help me understand what I am doing wrong here. Thank you
